meta.title: DJR Photography | David J. Richards — Capturing Moments. Creating Memories.
meta.description: DJR Photography by David J. Richards. Landscape, portrait, wedding, sports, event, and aerial photography based in Maine, USA.

pictureOfTheWeek.title: Guiding Light
pictureOfTheWeek.body: A peaceful reminder that even in the darkest moments, there is always a light to guide the way. Captured along the Maine coastline.
pictureOfTheWeek.imageAlt: Lighthouse on the Maine coastline at sunset

items.title: Landscape Photography
items.text: Breathtaking landscapes that capture the beauty of nature.

items.title: Portrait Photography
items.text: Natural, authentic portraits that tell your story.

items.title: Wedding Photography
items.text: Timeless memories of your most important day.

items.title: Sports Photography
items.text: High-energy action shots that capture the moment.

items.title: Aerial / Drone Photography
items.text: Stunning aerial perspectives from a new point of view.

about.title: Behind the Lens
about.body: I'm David J. Richards, a photographer based in Maine with a passion for capturing the moments that matter — from sweeping coastal landscapes to the split-second energy of game day. Every shoot is a chance to tell a story, and I'd love to help tell yours.

cta.title: Let's create something amazing together.
cta.sub: Whether it's a special moment or a big event, I'm here to capture it.
